data.src_id: Hong Kong University Data Science Team (HKUDS)
data.content:
creation,development	Hong Kong University Data Science Team (HKUDS)
LightRAG
The Hong Kong University Data Science Team developed and created the LightRAG framework.

enhancement,framework component	Knowledge Graph
LightRAG
LightRAG uses a knowledge graph as a core component to enhance its retrieval capabilities.

core advantage,modeling	Entities
LightRAG
A core advantage of LightRAG is its explicit modeling of entities within its knowledge graph.

core advantage,modeling	LightRAG
Relationships
A core advantage of LightRAG is its explicit modeling of relationships within its knowledge graph.

alternative,augmentation	LightRAG
Vector Retrieval
LightRAG provides an alternative to or augments traditional vector retrieval by incorporating graph-based modeling.

functionality,support	LightRAG
Query Modes
LightRAG supports multiple query modes as part of its retrieval functionality.
